final:
// // This module is designed to decrement its output value on each rising edge of the clock signal and reset to maximum when the reset signal is asserted low.
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(posedge clk or negedge reset) begin
    if(!reset) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else begin
        out <= out + 1;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module is designed to decrement its output value on each rising edge of the clock signal and reset to maximum when the reset signal is asserted low.
